INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHADOW_REGENT.title: The Captain
Show a preview of the top 3 cards of the cargo pile, in order.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DEVELOPMENT.title: Development
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHOW_WIP_CONTENT.title: Show WIP Content (REQUIRES RESTART)
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHOW_WIP_CONTENT.hover: Show and use non-finished content that is currently in development.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-KEYBINDS.title: Keybinds
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CAPTURE_CARGO_PILE_BIN:
Click to rebind the keyboard shortcut that opens the Cargo Pile.

Default: Ctrl + A
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CAPTURE_FIRE_BINDING.h:
Click to rebind the keyboard shortcut that triggers the FIRE! button.

Default: Ctrl + F
